label: Early LE
evidence: The atlas (Gopee et al., 2024) identifies 'Early LE' as a fine-grained endothelial cell annotation under the broad 'Lymphatic endothelium' category in prenatal skin (Supplementary Table 3, cell_type_annotations.json). LE is defined as 'lymphatic endothelium' in the atlas legend. Early LE represents an early/progenitor lymphatic endothelial cell state in fetal skin.
